fields.doc: Base APR that is accrued regardless of the utilization ratio of a pool
fields.name: base_apr_bps

fields.doc: APR that is accrued when the utilization ratio is at the kink 1 value
fields.name: kink1_apr_bps

fields.doc: APR that is accrued when the utilization ratio is at the kink 2 value
fields.name: kink2_apr_bps

fields.doc: APR that is accrued when the utilization ratio is at 100%
fields.name: max_apr_bps

params.doc: `true` if the request was missing from the Insurance Fund (e.g. archived);\n`false` if it was still Pending past the deadline and was actively cancelled.
params.name: missing

udt_struct_v0.doc:
Delegatee identifier for farm stakes.

Supports multiple stake identities per owner address:
- Simple: just owner address (for contracts where user has single position)
- With seed: owner address + seed (for contracts with multiple obligations per user)
udt_struct_v0.name: Delegatee

fields.doc: Optional seed to distinguish multiple positions per owner
fields.name: seed

udt_struct_v0.doc: Price data for an asset at a specific timestamp
udt_struct_v0.name: PriceData
